title: Benross 46260 8-in-1 Universal TV Remote Control/Controls TV, DVD, Cable Box, Air Conditioning & More/AAA Battery Powered/Easy Auto Setup/Clear Colourful Buttons
features: UNIVERSAL TV REMOTE – Control your TV and much more using this versatile 8-in-1 Universal Remote Control! Not only does it allow you to control necessary TV functions such as channel and volume changing, it’s also compatible with related devices such as DVD and VCR players, so you can switch between media without needing more than one remote!

CONTROLS OTHER DEVICES – This remote isn’t just restricted to controlling your TV and similar devices – it works for other media too! You can use it to control CD players, amplifiers, set boxes, cable boxes, and even air conditioning units!

SIMPLE SETUP – Thanks to the featured automatic search function, you can pair this remote to any of your devices in a short time by connecting them in accordance with the guidance displayed on the packaging. The remote is powered by 2x AAA batteries which are not included.

EASY TO USE – The remote features a variety of buttons that are clearly labelled, with many buttons such as the volume and power buttons also featuring stand-out colours to help identify them. This means that people who may have trouble using normal remotes, such as the elderly, can operate this remote with less trouble.
BENROSS – Benross manufactures a multitude of electrical appliances. From extension cords and adapters, to heaters and coolers for the home, you can find it all at the Benross store on Amazon.
description: Benross is a leading manufacturer of electrical appliances such as extension leads, adapters, heaters and coolers, and lighting. The range has been designed to provide you homes and offices with all the electrical equipment you need to live and work comfortably. Control your TV and other appliances with ease using this handy 8-in-1 Universal Remote Control! It covers the basic functions of a TV remote such as changing the volume and channels, while also being compatible with other media devices such as DVD and VCR players. The remote, powered by 2x AAA batteries (not included) comes with easy to read buttons which vary in colour to help make the remote easy to use for users who have visual difficulties. As well as working perfectly as a TV remote, it’s also compatible with appliances such as CD players, amplifiers, air conditioning units, and more! It’s the most versatile remote control that you could ever need.
